items.name: vk_pal
items.doc: Virtual-key code mapping and combo posting.

items.name: type_text
items.signature: pub fn type_text(hwnd: u64, text: &str) -> Result<(), AppError>
items.doc:
Types text into `hwnd` via WM_CHAR messages. No foreground required.
Converts `\n` to `\r` for RichEdit compatibility.

items.name: send_keys
items.signature: pub fn send_keys(hwnd: u64, keys: &str) -> Result<(), AppError>
items.doc: Sends a key combination to `hwnd` via WM_KEYDOWN/WM_KEYUP. No foreground required.
